overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a AAA sci-fi RPG showing a character in futuristic armor exploring a gleaming futuristic city during golden hour. The character walks along an elevated promenade with distinctive orange geometric furniture, passes other pedestrians, and enters a building through an elevator.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated outdoor promenade with geometric seating overlooking city

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated promenade past orange geometric seating arrangements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the same direction along the promenade
person standing by the railing looking out at the city view

entered.detail: tall building with layered glass and concrete architecture
distinctive bright orange geometric chairs and tables scattered across the plaza
safety railing with transparent glass panels and gold-colored metal posts
futuristic skyscrapers and towers visible in the hazy distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit elevated promenade lined with distinctive orange geometric furniture. A modern futuristic building rises on the right while the glass railing reveals a panoramic view of distant sci-fi towers bathed in golden hour light. Other pedestrians are scattered about, some walking and others admiring the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved elevated walkway with cable-stayed bridge overlook

events.description: path curves gently to the left following the building contour

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved walkway with panoramic views of the city and bridge structure

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket standing by the railing overlooking the cityscape

entered.detail: tall white bridge tower with cable supports extending downward

segments.scene_description: The walkway curves left, revealing a massive cable-stayed bridge pylon on the left side. The character passes a pedestrian in a red jacket who stands at the railing admiring the view. The orange seating and initial building recede as the path follows the contour of the structure, with flying vehicles visible in the distant sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor plaza with massive tree and wide staircase

events.description: ascends stairs from open sunlit walkway into shaded plaza area under large tree

agents.ego_description: ascending wide concrete stairs toward a plaza with a massive tree and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of people standing and conversing near the base of the large tree

entered.detail: broad set of concrete stairs leading upward to the plaza level
massive tree with thick trunk and hanging vines providing shade
smooth white exterior wall of the adjacent building

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and ascends a wide concrete staircase, transitioning from the bright open walkway to a shaded plaza dominated by a massive tree with hanging vines. Other pedestrians are visible at the top of the stairs near the tree, and the environment becomes more enclosed as the character moves under the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered corridor with blue walls leading to elevator

events.description: enters covered corridor with artificial accent lighting replacing natural sunlight
approaches and enters elevator doorway at end of corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor toward an elevator entrance

entered.detail: corridor wall painted blue with gold trim and decorative panels
futuristic elevator doorway with illuminated triangular symbols above
strip lighting running along the base of the walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow covered corridor with blue-trimmed walls and artificial lighting, leaving the outdoor plaza behind. The space is empty of other people. The character walks toward an elevator door at the end of the hall, which opens as the character approaches, marking the transition to an interior space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched elevated promenade into the sterile, enclosed interior of a futuristic building. It begins with the character walking past orange geometric furniture and glass railings that overlook a panoramic skyline of sci-fi towers bathed in golden hour light. As the walkway curves left, the scene opens up to reveal a massive cable-stayed bridge pylon and flying vehicles in the distance before the character passes a pedestrian in a red jacket. The environment then shifts from the bright open air to a shaded plaza as the character ascends a wide concrete staircase and moves beneath the canopy of a massive tree with hanging vines. Finally, the camera follows the character into a narrow, blue-trimmed corridor with artificial lighting, moving away from the crowd toward an elevator door that opens to welcome them inside.
